aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to limited conversational content and missing AI-friendly schema. While the site has basic information, it lacks depth and structured data for AI consumption.
quick_wins: Add FAQ content to address common customer queries.
Implement LocalBusiness schema with detailed service and location information.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not optimized and is invisible to Google AI, severely limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: GBP not found in search results.
Missing photos, posts, and Q&A to engage users and improve local ranking.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories for increased visibility.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for explaining services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content.

ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcase certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish authority.

agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
